apps.name: LocalSend
apps.description: File sharing app that discovers nearby devices and transfers files directly. Compatible with the LocalSend protocol.
apps.author: iappyx

apps.name: Radio Player
apps.description: Internet radio player with live station logos, podcasts, audio visualizer, and now-playing metadata.
apps.author: iappyx

apps.name: SSH Client
apps.description: Full-featured SSH client with terminal emulation, saved profiles, and SFTP file browser.
apps.author: iappyx

apps.name: Unicorn Checkers
apps.description: A magical checkers game with unicorn-themed pieces, AI opponent, and undo support.
apps.author: iappyx

apps.name: Road Trip NL
apps.description: A driving companion that announces nearby locations as you drive through the Netherlands. Bundled offline database with thousands of locations.
apps.author: iappyx

apps.name: App Launcher Rules
apps.description: App launcher based on rules. Start an app when connecting to Android Auto, WiFi, Bluetooth, headphones etc.
apps.author: iappyx

apps.name: File Airlock
apps.description: Share files with your mobile phone or PC using a small website hosted on your phone.
apps.author: iappyx

apps.name: Verhalenkistje
apps.description: Record voice and memories of loved ones
apps.author: iappyx
